title: Recognize the Standard Form
text: The given equation is in the standard form of an ellipse:(x**2)/(a**2)+(y**2)/(b**2)=1, where $$a^2=4$$, $$b^2=9$$, so $$a=2$$, $$b=3$$.

title: Use Trigonometric Parametric Equations
text: For an ellipse, the standard parametric equations are: $$x(t)=acos(t)$$, $$y(t)=bsin(t)$$.

title: Substitute the Value
text: Plug $$a=2$$ and $$b=3$$ into the standard parametric equations.
